title: Cross-Vendor Token Count Drift
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Optimization for Generative AI
description: Side-by-side tokenization of the same input across Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini, with per-vendor cost calculation.

learningObjectives: Assess which vendor offers the lowest cost for a given content shape

keyQuestions: Which vendor is cheapest for English prose? For code? For Japanese?
Does the cheapest token count always mean the cheapest dollar cost?
commonMisconceptions: Assuming token count is the same across vendors
Assuming the cheapest model is the cheapest vendor
assessmentOpportunities: Recommend a vendor for a given content shape and tier
